title: Stream Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that instructs a machine to emit output incrementally as tokens are generated, rather than buffering the complete response before returning it.

## When to use
Enable streaming for user-facing interfaces where progressive display improves perceived responsiveness. Disable it (the default) for batch pipelines, post-processing chains, or any consumer that requires the full output before proceeding.

## Notes
Streaming behavior is transport-dependent. Not all machine hosts or output ports support streaming; check the runtime documentation. When streaming is enabled, intermediate output frames may not conform to the final content type's schema.
